authors_text: Runqi Wang,Xiaoyue Duan,Baochang Zhang,Song Xue,Wentao Zhu,David Doermann,Guodong Guo
title: Associative Adversarial Learning Based on Selective Attack
title_zh: 基于选择性攻击的联想对抗学习
abstract: A human's attention can intuitively adapt to corrupted areas of an image by recalling a similar uncorrupted image they have previously seen. This observation motivates us to improve the attention of adversarial images by considering their clean counterparts. To accomplish this, we introduce Associative Adversarial Learning (AAL) into adversarial learning to guide a selective attack. We formulate the intrinsic relationship between attention and attack (perturbation) as a coupling optimization problem to improve their interaction. This leads to an attention backtracking algorithm that can effectively enhance the attention's adversarial robustness. Our method is generic and can be used to address a variety of tasks by simply choosing different kernels for the associative attention that select other regions for a specific attack. Experimental results show that the selective attack improves the model's performance. We show that our method improves the recognition accuracy of adversarial training on ImageNet by 8.32% compared with the baseline. It also increases object detection mAP on PascalVOC by 2.02% and recognition accuracy of few-shot learning on miniImageNet by 1.63%.

abstract_zh: 人类的注意力可以通过回忆他们之前见过的类似的未损坏的图像来直观地适应图像的损坏区域。这一观察激励我们通过考虑干净的对应图像来提高对抗性图像的注意力。为了实现这一目标，我们将关联对抗学习（AAL）引入对抗学习中以指导选择性攻击。我们将注意力和攻击（扰动）之间的内在关系表述为耦合优化问题，以改善它们的交互。这就产生了一种注意力回溯算法，可以有效增强注意力的对抗鲁棒性。我们的方法是通用的，可以通过简单地为关联注意力选择不同的内核来解决各种任务，并为特定的攻击选择其他区域。实验结果表明，选择性攻击提高了模型的性能。我们表明，与基线相比，我们的方法将 ImageNet 上的对抗训练的识别精度提高了 8.32%。它还将 PascalVOC 上的目标检测 mAP 提高了 2.02%，将 miniImageNet 上的少样本学习的识别准确率提高了 1.63%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于选择性攻击的关联对抗学习方法（AAL），通过结合干净图像的注意力机制提升对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过回忆未受损图像来适应受损区域，启发研究者利用干净图像的注意力机制增强对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将注意力与攻击（扰动）的内在关系建模为耦合优化问题，设计注意力回溯算法，并通过选择不同核函数适配多种任务。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上提升对抗训练准确率8.32%，在PascalVOC上提升目标检测mAP 2.02%，在miniImageNet上提升少样本学习准确率1.63%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过关联对抗学习有效提升模型鲁棒性，且具有通用性，可适配多种视觉任务。

authors_text: Yayun Du,Guofeng Zhang,Darren Tsang,M. Khalid Jawed
title: Deep-CNN based Robotic Multi-Class Under-Canopy Weed Control in Precision Farming
title_zh: 精准农业中基于 Deep-CNN 的机器人多类冠层下杂草控制
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, International Conference on Robotics and Automation (IEEE)
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, International Conference on Robotics and Automation (IEEE)
abstract: Smart weeding systems to perform plant-specific operations can contribute to the sustainability of agriculture and the environment. Despite monumental advances in autonomous robotic technologies for precision weed management in recent years, work on under-canopy weeding in fields is yet to be realized. A prerequisite of such systems is reliable detection and classification of weeds to avoid mistakenly spraying and, thus, damaging the surrounding plants. Real-time multi-class weed identification enables species-specific treatment of weeds and significantly reduces the amount of herbicide use. Here, our first contribution is the first adequately large realistic image dataset \textit{AIWeeds} (one/multiple kinds of weeds in one image), a library of about 10,000 annotated images of flax, and the 14 most common weeds in fields and gardens taken from 20 different locations in North Dakota, California, and Central China. Second, we provide a full pipeline from model training with maximum efficiency to deploying the TensorRT-optimized model onto a single board computer. Based on \textit{AIWeeds} and the pipeline, we present a baseline for classification performance using five benchmark CNN models. Among them, MobileNetV2, with both the shortest inference time and lowest memory consumption, is the qualified candidate for real-time applications. Finally, we deploy MobileNetV2 onto our own compact autonomous robot \textit{SAMBot} for real-time weed detection. The 90\% test accuracy realized in previously unseen scenes in flax fields (with a row spacing of 0.2-0.3 m), with crops and weeds, distortion, blur, and shadows, is a milestone towards precision weed control in the real world. We have publicly released the dataset and code to generate the results at \url{https://github.com/StructuresComp/Multi-class-Weed-Classification}.

abstract_zh: 执行特定植物操作的智能除草系统有助于农业和环境的可持续发展。尽管近年来用于精准杂草管理的自主机器人技术取得了巨大进步，但田间树冠下除草工作尚未实现。这种系统的先决条件是对杂草进行可靠的检测和分类，以避免错误喷洒，从而损坏周围的植物。实时多类杂草识别可以对杂草进行特定种类的处理，并显着减少除草剂的使用量。在这里，我们的第一个贡献是第一个足够大的真实图像数据集 \textit{AIWeeds} （一张图像中的一种/多种杂草），一个包含约 10,000 张带注释的亚麻图像的库，以及取自北达科他州、加利福尼亚州和中国中部 20 个不同地点的田野和花园中 14 种最常见的杂草。其次，我们提供了从以最高效率进行模型训练到将 TensorRT 优化模型部署到单板计算机上的完整流程。基于 \textit{AIWeeds} 和管道，我们使用五个基准 CNN 模型提出了分类性能基线。其中，MobileNetV2 具有最短的推理时间和最低的内存消耗，是实时应用的合格候选者。最后，我们将 MobileNetV2 部署到我们自己的紧凑型自主机器人 \textit{SAMBot} 上进行实时杂草检测。在以前未见过的亚麻田（行距0.2-0.3 m）场景中实现了90％的测试精度，其中包括农作物和杂草、扭曲、模糊和阴影，这是现实世界中精确杂草控制的里程碑。我们已在 \url{https://github.com/StructuresComp/Multi-class-Weed-Classification} 公开发布了数据集和生成结果的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度CNN的机器人多类杂草识别系统，用于精准农业中的作物行间杂草控制。
AI.motivation: 精准农业需要减少除草剂使用并保护作物，但现有系统难以实现复杂田间环境下的实时多类杂草识别。
AI.method: 构建包含10,000张标注图像的AIWeeds数据集，采用MobileNetV2等五种CNN模型进行训练优化，通过TensorRT部署到SAMBot机器人实现实时检测。
AI.result: 在包含作物与杂草、模糊和阴影的田间场景中达到90%测试准确率，MobileNetV2模型推理时间最短且内存消耗最低。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为真实场景下的精准除草提供了可行方案，数据集和代码已开源促进领域发展。

authors_text: Shoya Matsumori,Yuki Abe,Kosuke Shingyouchi,Komei Sugiura,Michita Imai
title: LatteGAN: Visually Guided Language Attention for Multi-Turn Text-Conditioned Image Manipulation
title_zh: LatteGAN：用于多轮文本条件图像操作的视觉引导语言注意
abstract: Text-guided image manipulation tasks have recently gained attention in the vision-and-language community. While most of the prior studies focused on single-turn manipulation, our goal in this paper is to address the more challenging multi-turn image manipulation (MTIM) task. Previous models for this task successfully generate images iteratively, given a sequence of instructions and a previously generated image. However, this approach suffers from under-generation and a lack of generated quality of the objects that are described in the instructions, which consequently degrades the overall performance. To overcome these problems, we present a novel architecture called a Visually Guided Language Attention GAN (LatteGAN). Here, we address the limitations of the previous approaches by introducing a Visually Guided Language Attention (Latte) module, which extracts fine-grained text representations for the generator, and a Text-Conditioned U-Net discriminator architecture, which discriminates both the global and local representations of fake or real images. Extensive experiments on two distinct MTIM datasets, CoDraw and i-CLEVR, demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed model.
summary: Text-guided image manipulation tasks have recently gained attention in the vision-and-language community. While most of the prior studies focused on single-turn manipulation, our goal in this paper is to address the more challenging multi-turn image manipulation (MTIM) task. Previous models for this task successfully generate images iteratively, given a sequence of instructions and a previously generated image. However, this approach suffers from under-generation and a lack of generated quality of the objects that are described in the instructions, which consequently degrades the overall performance. To overcome these problems, we present a novel architecture called a Visually Guided Language Attention GAN (LatteGAN). Here, we address the limitations of the previous approaches by introducing a Visually Guided Language Attention (Latte) module, which extracts fine-grained text representations for the generator, and a Text-Conditioned U-Net discriminator architecture, which discriminates both the global and local representations of fake or real images. Extensive experiments on two distinct MTIM datasets, CoDraw and i-CLEVR, demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 文本引导的图像处理任务最近引起了视觉和语言社区的关注。虽然大多数先前的研究都集中在单轮操纵上，但我们在本文中的目标是解决更具挑战性的多轮图像操纵（MTIM）任务。给定一系列指令和先前生成的图像，此任务的先前模型可以迭代地成功生成图像。然而，这种方法存在生成不足以及指令中描述的对象生成质量缺乏的问题，从而降低了整体性能。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种称为视觉引导语言注意力 GAN (LatteGAN) 的新颖架构。在这里，我们通过引入视觉引导语言注意（Latte）模块和文本条件 U-Net 判别器架构来解决以前方法的局限性，该模块为生成器提取细粒度的文本表示，而文本条件 U-Net 判别器架构则区分假图像或真实图像的全局和局部表示。对两个不同的 MTIM 数据集 CoDraw 和 i-CLEVR 进行的广泛实验证明了所提出模型的最先进性能。

search_text: LatteGAN: Visually Guided Language Attention for Multi-Turn Text-Conditioned Image Manipulation LatteGAN：用于多轮文本条件图像操作的视觉引导语言注意 Text-guided image manipulation tasks have recently gained attention in the vision-and-language community. While most of the prior studies focused on single-turn manipulation, our goal in this paper is to address the more challenging multi-turn image manipulation (MTIM) task. Previous models for this task successfully generate images iteratively, given a sequence of instructions and a previously generated image. However, this approach suffers from under-generation and a lack of generated quality of the objects that are described in the instructions, which consequently degrades the overall performance. To overcome these problems, we present a novel architecture called a Visually Guided Language Attention GAN (LatteGAN). Here, we address the limitations of the previous approaches by introducing a Visually Guided Language Attention (Latte) module, which extracts fine-grained text representations for the generator, and a Text-Conditioned U-Net discriminator architecture, which discriminates both the global and local representations of fake or real images. authors_text: Xiaoqing Yang,Fei Li
title: Relative velocity-based reward functions for crowd navigation of robots
title_zh: 用于机器人人群导航的基于相对速度的奖励函数
abstract: The four-wheeled Mecanum robot is widely used in various industries due to its maneuverability and strong load capacity, which is suitable for performing precise transportation tasks in a narrow environment, but while the Mecanum wheel robot has mobility, it also consumes more energy than ordinary robots. The power consumed by the Mecanum wheel mobile robot varies enormously depending on their operating regimes and environments. Therefore, only knowing the working environment of the robot and the accurate power consumption model can we accurately predict the power consumption of the robot. In order to increase the appli-cable scenarios of energy consumption modeling for Mecanum wheel robots and improve the accuracy of energy consumption modeling, this paper focuses on various factors that affect the energy consumption of the Mecanum wheel robot, such as motor temperature, terrain, the center of gravity position, etc. The model is derived from the kinematic and kinetic model combined with electrical engineering and energy flow principles. The model has been simulated in MATLAB and experimentally validated with the four-wheeled Mecanum robot platform in our lab. Experimental results show that the model is 90% accurate. The results of energy consumption modeling can help robots to save energy by helping them to perform rational path planning and task planning.

abstract_zh: 四轮麦克纳姆机器人因其机动性强、负载能力强而被广泛应用于各个行业，适合在狭窄的环境中执行精确的运输任务，但麦克纳姆轮机器人在具有机动性的同时，也比普通机器人消耗更多的能量。麦克纳姆轮移动机器人的功耗根据其运行方式和环境的不同而有很大差异。因此，只有了解机器人的工作环境和准确的功耗模型，才能准确预测机器人的功耗。为了增加麦克纳姆轮机器人能耗建模的适用场景，提高能耗建模的准确性，本文重点研究了影响麦克纳姆轮机器人能耗的各种因素，如电机温度、地形、重心位置等。模型是由运动学和动力学模型结合电气工程和能量流原理推导出来的。该模型已在 MATLAB 中进行了仿真，并在我们实验室的四轮麦克纳姆机器人平台上进行了实验验证。实验结果表明，该模型的准确率达到90%。能耗建模的结果可以帮助机器人进行合理的路径规划和任务规划，从而帮助机器人节省能源。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立四轮Mecanum轮机器人的能耗模型，以提升能量消耗建模的适用场景和准确性。
AI.motivation: Mecanum轮机器人虽具备高机动性，但能耗受多种因素影响（如温度、地形等），现有模型难以精准预测能耗，需改进建模方法以实现节能。
AI.method: 结合运动学、动力学模型与电气工程原理，建立多因素能耗模型，并通过MATLAB仿真及实验室四轮Mecanum机器人平台实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明模型准确率达90%，可辅助机器人进行合理路径与任务规划，从而降低能耗。
AI.conclusion: 提出的能耗模型有效提升了预测准确性，为机器人节能优化提供了理论支持与实践依据。

authors_text: Meng Lan,Jing Zhang,Fengxiang He,Lefei Zhang
title: Siamese Network with Interactive Transformer for Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 具有交互式变压器的连体网络用于视频对象分割
abstract: Semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) refers to segmenting the target object in remaining frames given its annotation in the first frame, which has been actively studied in recent years. The key challenge lies in finding effective ways to exploit the spatio-temporal context of past frames to help learn discriminative target representation of current frame. In this paper, we propose a novel Siamese network with a specifically designed interactive transformer, called SITVOS, to enable effective context propagation from historical to current frames. Technically, we use the transformer encoder and decoder to handle the past frames and current frame separately, i.e., the encoder encodes robust spatio-temporal context of target object from the past frames, while the decoder takes the feature embedding of current frame as the query to retrieve the target from the encoder output. To further enhance the target representation, a feature interaction module (FIM) is devised to promote the information flow between the encoder and decoder. Moreover, we employ the Siamese architecture to extract backbone features of both past and current frames, which enables feature reuse and is more efficient than existing methods. Experimental results on three challenging benchmarks validate the superiority of SITVOS over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) refers to segmenting the target object in remaining frames given its annotation in the first frame, which has been actively studied in recent years. The key challenge lies in finding effective ways to exploit the spatio-temporal context of past frames to help learn discriminative target representation of current frame. To further enhance the target representation, a feature interaction module (FIM) is devised to promote the information flow between the encoder and decoder. Moreover, we employ the Siamese architecture to extract backbone features of both past and current frames, which enables feature reuse and is more efficient than existing methods. Experimental results on three challenging benchmarks validate the superiority of SITVOS over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 半监督视频对象分割（VOS）是指在给定第一帧中目标对象的注释的情况下，在剩余帧中分割目标对象，近年来得到了积极的研究。关键的挑战在于找到有效的方法来利用过去帧的时空上下文来帮助学习当前帧的判别性目标表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的暹罗网络，具有专门设计的交互式变压器，称为 SITVOS，以实现从历史帧到当前帧的有效上下文传播。从技术上讲，我们使用 Transformer 编码器和解码器分别处理过去帧和当前帧，即编码器从过去帧中编码目标对象的鲁棒时空上下文，而解码器将当前帧的特征嵌入作为查询从编码器输出中检索目标。为了进一步增强目标表示，设计了特征交互模块（FIM）来促进编码器和解码器之间的信息流。此外，我们采用 Siamese 架构来提取过去和当前帧的主干特征，这使得特征重用成为可能，并且比现有方法更有效。三个具有挑战性的基准的实验结果验证了 SITVOS 相对于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Siamese网络和交互式Transformer的视频对象分割方法，旨在通过利用历史帧的时空信息来提升当前帧的目标分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效利用历史帧的时空信息，导致当前帧的目标表示不够准确，需设计更有效的上下文传播机制。
AI.method: 方法包括使用Transformer编码器处理历史帧以提取时空上下文，解码器通过当前帧特征查询目标，结合特征交互模块增强信息流动，并采用Siamese结构提升效率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SITVOS在三个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效整合历史帧信息和优化网络结构，在视频对象分割任务中取得了显著提升。

search_text: Siamese Network with Interactive Transformer for Video Object Segmentation 具有交互式变压器的连体网络用于视频对象分割 Semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS) refers to segmenting the target object in remaining frames given its annotation in the first frame, which has been actively studied in recent years. The key challenge lies in finding effective ways to exploit the spatio-temporal context of past frames to help learn discriminative target representation of current frame. In this paper, we propose a novel Siamese network with a specifically designed interactive transformer, called SITVOS, to enable effective context propagation from historical to current frames. Technically, we use the transformer encoder and decoder to handle the past frames and current frame separately, i.e., the encoder encodes robust spatio-temporal context of target object from the past frames, while the decoder takes the feature embedding of current frame as the query to retrieve the target from the encoder output. To further enhance the target representation, a feature interaction module (FIM) is devised to promote the information flow between the encoder and decoder. Moreover, we employ the Siamese architecture to extract backbone features of both past and current frames, which enables feature reuse and is more efficient than existing methods. Experimental results on three challenging benchmarks validate the superiority of SITVOS over state-of-the-art methods. 半监督视频对象分割（VOS）是指在给定第一帧中目标对象的注释的情况下，在剩余帧中分割目标对象，近年来得到了积极的研究。关键的挑战在于找到有效的方法来利用过去帧的时空上下文来帮助学习当前帧的判别性目标表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的暹罗网络，具有专门设计的交互式变压器，称为 SITVOS，以实现从历史帧到当前帧的有效上下文传播。从技术上讲，我们使用 Transformer 编码器和解码器分别处理过去帧和当前帧，即编码器从过去帧中编码目标对象的鲁棒时空上下文，而解码器将当前帧的特征嵌入作为查询从编码器输出中检索目标。为了进一步增强目标表示，设计了特征交互模块（FIM）来促进编码器和解码器之间的信息流。此外，我们采用 Siamese 架构来提取过去和当前帧的主干特征，这使得特征重用成为可能，并且比现有方法更有效。三个具有挑战性的基准的实验结果验证了 SITVOS 相对于最先进方法的优越性。 该论文提出了一种基于Siamese网络和交互式Transformer的视频对象分割方法，旨在通过利用历史帧的时空信息来提升当前帧的目标分割效果。 Meng Lan,Jing Zhang,Fengxiang He,Lefei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Juan Han,Kit Ian Kou,Jifei Miao
title: Quaternion-based dynamic mode decomposition for background modeling in color videos
title_zh: 用于彩色视频背景建模的基于四元数的动态模式分解
abstract: Scene Background Initialization (SBI) is one of the challenging problems in computer vision. Dynamic mode decomposition (DMD) is a recently proposed method to robustly decompose a video sequence into the background model and the corresponding foreground part. However, this method needs to convert the color image into the grayscale image for processing, which leads to the neglect of the coupling information between the three channels of the color image. In this study, we propose a quaternion-based DMD (Q-DMD), which extends the DMD by quaternion matrix analysis, so as to completely preserve the inherent color structure of the color image and the color video. We exploit the standard eigenvalues of the quaternion matrix to compute its spectral decomposition and calculate the corresponding Q-DMD modes and eigenvalues. The results on the publicly available benchmark datasets prove that our Q-DMD outperforms the exact DMD method, and experiment results also demonstrate that the performance of our approach is comparable to that of the state-of-the-art ones.

However, this method needs to convert the color image into the grayscale image for processing, which leads to the neglect of the coupling information between the three channels of the color image. In this study, we propose a quaternion-based DMD (Q-DMD), which extends the DMD by quaternion matrix analysis, so as to completely preserve the inherent color structure of the color image and the color video. We exploit the standard eigenvalues of the quaternion matrix to compute its spectral decomposition and calculate the corresponding Q-DMD modes and eigenvalues. The results on the publicly available benchmark datasets prove that our Q-DMD outperforms the exact DMD method, and experiment results also demonstrate that the performance of our approach is comparable to that of the state-of-the-art ones.
abstract_zh: 场景背景初始化（SBI）是计算机视觉中具有挑战性的问题之一。动态模式分解（DMD）是最近提出的一种方法，可以将视频序列鲁棒地分解为背景模型和相应的前景部分。但该方法需要将彩色图像转换为灰度图像进行处理，导致忽略了彩色图像三个通道之间的耦合信息。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于四元数的DMD（Q-DMD），通过四元数矩阵分析扩展了DMD，从而完全保留了彩色图像和彩色视频的固有颜色结构。我们利用四元数矩阵的标准特征值来计算其谱分解并计算相应的 Q-DMD 模式和特征值。公开的基准数据集上的结果证明我们的 Q-DMD 优于精确的 DMD 方法，实验结果也表明我们的方法的性能与最先进的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于四元数的动态模式分解（Q-DMD）方法，用于彩色视频的背景建模，以解决传统方法忽略颜色通道耦合信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统动态模式分解（DMD）方法需将彩色图像转为灰度图处理，导致丢失颜色通道间的耦合信息，影响背景建模效果。
AI.method: 通过四元数矩阵分析扩展DMD方法，利用四元数矩阵的标准特征值进行谱分解，计算Q-DMD模式与特征值以保留颜色结构。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，Q-DMD优于传统DMD方法，且性能与当前最先进的方法相当。
AI.conclusion: Q-DMD方法能有效保留彩色视频的颜色结构，提升背景建模效果，为相关应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Xing Wang,Hanwen Kang,Hongyu Zhou,Wesley Au,Chao Chen
title: Soft Robotic Finger with Variable Effective Length enabled by an Antagonistic Constraint Mechanism
title_zh: 由对抗约束机制实现的具有可变有效长度的软机器人手指
abstract: Compared to traditional rigid robotics, soft robotics has attracted increasing attention due to its advantages as compliance, safety, and low cost. As an essential part of soft robotics, the soft robotic gripper also shows its superior while grasping the objects with irregular shapes. Recent research has been conducted to improve its grasping performance by adjusting the variable effective length (VEL). However, the VEL achieved by multi-chamber design or tunable stiffness shape memory material requires complex pneumatic circuit design or a time-consuming phase-changing process. This work proposes a fold-based soft robotic actuator made from 3D printed filament, NinjaFlex. It is experimentally tested and represented by the hyperelastic model. Mathematic and finite element modelling is conducted to study the bending behaviour of the proposed soft actuator. Besides, an antagonistic constraint mechanism is proposed to achieve the VEL, and the experiments demonstrate that better conformity is achieved. Finally, a two-mode gripper is designed and evaluated to demonstrate the advances of VEL on grasping performance.

abstract_zh: 与传统的刚性机器人相比，软体机器人因其合规性、安全性、低成本等优势而受到越来越多的关注。作为软体机器人的重要组成部分，软体机器人抓手在抓取不规则形状的物体时也显示出其优越性。最近的研究通过调整可变有效长度（VEL）来提高其抓取性能。然而，通过多室设计或可调刚度形状记忆材料实现的VEL需要复杂的气动回路设计或耗时的相变过程。这项工作提出了一种由 3D 打印长丝制成的基于折叠的软机器人执行器 NinjaFlex。它经过实验测试并由超弹性模型表示。通过数学和有限元建模来研究所提出的软执行器的弯曲行为。此外，还提出了一种对抗性约束机制来实现VEL，实验表明取得了更好的一致性。最后，设计并评估了两种模式的夹具，以展示 VEL 在抓取性能方面的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于对抗约束机制的可变有效长度软体机械手指，以提升软体夹爪对不规则物体的抓取性能。
AI.motivation: 传统软体夹爪的可变有效长度（VEL）方法存在气动电路复杂或相变过程耗时的问题，亟需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用3D打印NinjaFlex材料制备折叠结构软体执行器，结合超弹性模型与有限元分析，通过对抗约束机制实现VEL控制。
AI.result: 实验表明对抗约束机制显著提升夹爪贴合性，双模式夹爪设计验证了VEL对抓取性能的优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化结构设计实现了高效VEL控制，为软体机器人抓取不规则物体提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiao Sun,Tongshuang Wu,Yue Jiang,Ronil Awalegaonkar,Xi Victoria Lin,Diyi Yang
title: Pretty Princess vs. Successful Leader: Gender Roles in Greeting Card Messages
title_zh: 漂亮公主与成功领导者：贺卡信息中的性别角色
abstract: People write personalized greeting cards on various occasions. While prior work has studied gender roles in greeting card messages, systematic analysis at scale and tools for raising the awareness of gender stereotyping remain under-investigated. To this end, we collect a large greeting card message corpus covering three different occasions (birthday, Valentine's Day and wedding) from three sources (exemplars from greeting message websites, real-life greetings from social media and language model generated ones). We uncover a wide range of gender stereotypes in this corpus via topic modeling, odds ratio and Word Embedding Association Test (WEAT). We further conduct a survey to understand people's perception of gender roles in messages from this corpus and if gender stereotyping is a concern. The results show that people want to be aware of gender roles in the messages, but remain unconcerned unless the perceived gender roles conflict with the recipient's true personality. In response, we developed GreetA, an interactive visualization and writing assistant tool to visualize fine-grained topics in greeting card messages drafted by the users and the associated gender perception scores, but without suggesting text changes as an intervention.

abstract_zh: 人们在不同的场合写个性化的贺卡。虽然之前的工作研究了贺卡信息中的性别角色，但大规模的系统分析和提高性别陈规定型观念意识的工具仍然没有得到充分研究。为此，我们从三个来源（来自问候消息网站的示例、来自社交媒体的现实生活问候语和语言模型生成的问候语）收集了涵盖三个不同场合（生日、情人节和婚礼）的大型贺卡消息语料库。我们通过主题建模、优势比和词嵌入关联测试（WEAT）在该语料库中发现了广泛的性别刻板印象。我们进一步进行了一项调查，以了解人们对这个语料库中的信息中的性别角色的看法，以及性别刻板印象是否是一个问题。结果表明，人们希望了解消息中的性别角色，但除非感知到的性别角色与接收者的真实个性相冲突，否则不会关心。为此，我们开发了 GreetA，这是一种交互式可视化和写作辅助工具，可以可视化用户起草的贺卡消息中的细粒度主题以及相关的性别感知得分，但不建议更改文本作为干预。

search_text: Pretty Princess vs. Successful Leader: Gender Roles in Greeting Card Messages 漂亮公主与成功领导者：贺卡信息中的性别角色 People write personalized greeting cards on various occasions. While prior work has studied gender roles in greeting card messages, systematic analysis at scale and tools for raising the awareness of gender stereotyping remain under-investigated. To this end, we collect a large greeting card message corpus covering three different occasions (birthday, Valentine's Day and wedding) from three sources (exemplars from greeting message websites, real-life greetings from social media and language model generated ones). We uncover a wide range of gender stereotypes in this corpus via topic modeling, odds ratio and Word Embedding Association Test (WEAT). We further conduct a survey to understand people's perception of gender roles in messages from this corpus and if gender stereotyping is a concern. The results show that people want to be aware of gender roles in the messages, but remain unconcerned unless the perceived gender roles conflict with the recipient's true personality. authors_text: Qiqi Gu,Shen Chen,Taiping Yao,Yang Chen,Shouhong Ding,Ran Yi
title: Exploiting Fine-grained Face Forgery Clues via Progressive Enhancement Learning
title_zh: 通过渐进增强学习利用细粒度的人脸伪造线索
abstract: With the rapid development of facial forgery techniques, forgery detection has attracted more and more attention due to security concerns. Existing approaches attempt to use frequency information to mine subtle artifacts under high-quality forged faces. However, the exploitation of frequency information is coarse-grained, and more importantly, their vanilla learning process struggles to extract fine-grained forgery traces. To address this issue, we propose a progressive enhancement learning framework to exploit both the RGB and fine-grained frequency clues. Specifically, we perform a fine-grained decomposition of RGB images to completely decouple the real and fake traces in the frequency space. Subsequently, we propose a progressive enhancement learning framework based on a two-branch network, combined with self-enhancement and mutual-enhancement modules. The self-enhancement module captures the traces in different input spaces based on spatial noise enhancement and channel attention. The Mutual-enhancement module concurrently enhances RGB and frequency features by communicating in the shared spatial dimension. The progressive enhancement process facilitates the learning of discriminative features with fine-grained face forgery clues. Extensive experiments on several datasets show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art face forgery detection methods.

Existing approaches attempt to use frequency information to mine subtle artifacts under high-quality forged faces. To address this issue, we propose a progressive enhancement learning framework to exploit both the RGB and fine-grained frequency clues. Specifically, we perform a fine-grained decomposition of RGB images to completely decouple the real and fake traces in the frequency space. Subsequently, we propose a progressive enhancement learning framework based on a two-branch network, combined with self-enhancement and mutual-enhancement modules. The self-enhancement module captures the traces in different input spaces based on spatial noise enhancement and channel attention. The Mutual-enhancement module concurrently enhances RGB and frequency features by communicating in the shared spatial dimension. The progressive enhancement process facilitates the learning of discriminative features with fine-grained face forgery clues. Extensive experiments on several datasets show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art face forgery detection methods.
abstract_zh: 随着面部伪造技术的快速发展，出于安全考虑，伪造检测引起了越来越多的关注。现有方法尝试使用频率信息来挖掘高质量伪造面孔下的细微伪影。然而，频率信息的利用是粗粒度的，更重要的是，他们的普通学习过程很难提取细粒度的伪造痕迹。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个渐进增强学习框架来利用 RGB 和细粒度频率线索。具体来说，我们对 RGB 图像进行细粒度分解，以完全解耦频率空间中的真迹和假迹。随后，我们提出了一种基于两分支网络、结合自我增强和互增强模块的渐进增强学习框架。自我增强模块基于空间噪声增强和通道注意力来捕获不同输入空间中的踪迹。互增强模块通过在共享空间维度上进行通信，同时增强 RGB 和频率特征。渐进增强过程有助于学习具有细粒度人脸伪造线索的判别特征。对多个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的人脸伪造检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进增强学习框架，通过结合RGB图像和细粒度频率线索，提升人脸伪造检测的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法利用频率信息检测伪造痕迹，但存在粗粒度分析和难以提取细粒度伪造线索的局限性，需改进学习过程以更精确地捕捉伪造特征。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络框架，包含自增强模块（通过空间噪声增强和通道注意力提取多空间线索）与互增强模块（在共享空间维度协同增强RGB和频率特征），实现细粒度伪造线索的渐进式特征学习。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在检测性能上优于当前最先进的 face forgery 检测技术。
AI.conclusion: 渐进增强学习框架能有效挖掘细粒度伪造线索，为高精度人脸伪造检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Akansha Singh Bansal,Trapit Bansal,David Irwin
title: A Moment in the Sun: Solar Nowcasting from Multispectral Satellite Data using Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 阳光下的时刻：使用自我监督学习从多光谱卫星数据进行太阳临近预报
abstract: Solar energy is now the cheapest form of electricity in history. Unfortunately, significantly increasing the grid's fraction of solar energy remains challenging due to its variability, which makes balancing electricity's supply and demand more difficult. While thermal generators' ramp rate -- the maximum rate that they can change their output -- is finite, solar's ramp rate is essentially infinite. Thus, accurate near-term solar forecasting, or nowcasting, is important to provide advance warning to adjust thermal generator output in response to solar variations to ensure a balanced supply and demand. To address the problem, this paper develops a general model for solar nowcasting from abundant and readily available multispectral satellite data using self-supervised learning. Specifically, we develop deep auto-regressive models using convolutional neural networks (CNN) and long short-term memory networks (LSTM) that are globally trained across multiple locations to predict raw future observations of the spatio-temporal data collected by the recently launched GOES-R series of satellites. Our model estimates a location's future solar irradiance based on satellite observations, which we feed to a regression model trained on smaller site-specific solar data to provide near-term solar photovoltaic (PV) forecasts that account for site-specific characteristics. We evaluate our approach for different coverage areas and forecast horizons across 25 solar sites and show that our approach yields errors close to that of a model using ground-truth observations.

abstract_zh: 太阳能现在是历史上最便宜的电力形式。不幸的是，由于太阳能的可变性，显着增加电网中太阳能的比例仍然具有挑战性，这使得平衡电力的供需变得更加困难。虽然热发电机的斜坡率（它们可以改变输出的最大速率）是有限的，但太阳能的斜坡率基本上是无限的。因此，准确的近期太阳预报或临近预报对于提供预警以根据太阳变化调整热发电机输出以确保供需平衡非常重要。为了解决这个问题，本文利用自监督学习，根据丰富且容易获得的多光谱卫星数据开发了一种太阳临近预报的通用模型。具体来说，我们使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和长期短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 开发深度自回归模型，这些模型在多个位置进行全局训练，以预测最近发射的 GOES-R 系列卫星收集的时空数据的原始未来观测结果。我们的模型根据卫星观测来估计某个位置的未来太阳辐照度，并将其提供给一个回归模型，该回归模型根据较小的特定地点太阳数据进行训练，以提供考虑特定地点特征的近期太阳能光伏 (PV) 预测。我们评估了我们针对 25 个太阳能站点的不同覆盖区域和预测范围的方法，结果表明我们的方法产生的误差接近于使用地面实况观测的模型的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多光谱卫星数据和自监督学习的太阳能短期预测（nowcasting）模型，以应对太阳能波动对电网平衡的挑战。
AI.motivation: 太阳能虽成本最低，但其输出波动性导致电网供需平衡困难。传统热电发电机无法快速响应太阳能突变，需通过精准的短期预测提前调整输出。
AI.method: 开发结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的自监督深度自回归模型，利用GOES-R卫星的时空数据进行跨区域训练，并融合站点特定数据的回归模型优化预测精度。
AI.result: 在25个太阳能站点的多区域和多时间跨度测试中，模型误差接近使用真实观测数据的基准模型，验证了其有效性。

search_text: A Moment in the Sun: Solar Nowcasting from Multispectral Satellite Data using Self-Supervised Learning 阳光下的时刻：使用自我监督学习从多光谱卫星数据进行太阳临近预报 Solar energy is now the cheapest form of electricity in history. Unfortunately, significantly increasing the grid's fraction of solar energy remains challenging due to its variability, which makes balancing electricity's supply and demand more difficult. While thermal generators' ramp rate -- the maximum rate that they can change their output -- is finite, solar's ramp rate is essentially infinite. Thus, accurate near-term solar forecasting, or nowcasting, is important to provide advance warning to adjust thermal generator output in response to solar variations to ensure a balanced supply and demand. To address the problem, this paper develops a general model for solar nowcasting from abundant and readily available multispectral satellite data using self-supervised learning. Specifically, we develop deep auto-regressive models using convolutional neural networks (CNN) and long short-term memory networks (LSTM) that are globally trained across multiple locations to predict raw future observations of the spatio-temporal data collected by the recently launched GOES-R series of satellites. Our model estimates a location's future solar irradiance based on satellite observations, which we feed to a regression model trained on smaller site-specific solar data to provide near-term solar photovoltaic (PV) forecasts that account for site-specific characteristics. We evaluate our approach for different coverage areas and forecast horizons across 25 solar sites and show that our approach yields errors close to that of a model using ground-truth observations. 太阳能现在是历史上最便宜的电力形式。不幸的是，由于太阳能的可变性，显着增加电网中太阳能的比例仍然具有挑战性，这使得平衡电力的供需变得更加困难。虽然热发电机的斜坡率（它们可以改变输出的最大速率）是有限的，但太阳能的斜坡率基本上是无限的。因此，准确的近期太阳预报或临近预报对于提供预警以根据太阳变化调整热发电机输出以确保供需平衡非常重要。为了解决这个问题，本文利用自监督学习，根据丰富且容易获得的多光谱卫星数据开发了一种太阳临近预报的通用模型。具体来说，我们使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和长期短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 开发深度自回归模型，这些模型在多个位置进行全局训练，以预测最近发射的 GOES-R 系列卫星收集的时空数据的原始未来观测结果。我们的模型根据卫星观测来估计某个位置的未来太阳辐照度，并将其提供给一个回归模型，该回归模型根据较小的特定地点太阳数据进行训练，以提供考虑特定地点特征的近期太阳能光伏 (PV) 预测。我们评估了我们针对 25 个太阳能站点的不同覆盖区域和预测范围的方法，结果表明我们的方法产生的误差接近于使用地面实况观测的模型的误差。 本文提出一种基于多光谱卫星数据和自监督学习的太阳能短期预测（nowcasting）模型，以应对太阳能波动对电网平衡的挑战。 Akansha Singh Bansal,Trapit Bansal,David Irwin cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Xinheng Liu,Yao Chen,Prakhar Ganesh,Junhao Pan,Jinjun Xiong,Deming Chen
title: HiKonv: High Throughput Quantized Convolution With Novel Bit-wise Management and Computation
title_zh: HiKonv：具有新颖的按位管理和计算的高吞吐量量化卷积
abstract: Quantization for Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) has shown significant progress with the intention of reducing the cost of computation and storage with low-bitwidth data inputs. There are, however, no systematic studies on how an existing full-bitwidth processing unit, such as CPUs and DSPs, can be better utilized to carry out significantly higher computation throughput for convolution under various quantized bitwidths. In this study, we propose HiKonv, a unified solution that maximizes the compute throughput of a given underlying processing unit to process low-bitwidth quantized data inputs through novel bit-wise parallel computation. We establish theoretical performance bounds using a full-bitwidth multiplier for highly parallelized low-bitwidth convolution, and demonstrate new breakthroughs for high-performance computing in this critical domain. For example, a single 32-bit processing unit can deliver 128 binarized convolution operations (multiplications and additions) under one CPU instruction, and a single 27x18 DSP core can deliver eight convolution operations with 4-bit inputs in one cycle. We demonstrate the effectiveness of HiKonv on CPU and FPGA for both convolutional layers or a complete DNN model. For a convolutional layer quantized to 4-bit, HiKonv achieves a 3.17x latency improvement over the baseline implementation using C++ on CPU. Compared to the DAC-SDC 2020 champion model for FPGA, HiKonv achieves a 2.37x throughput improvement and 2.61x DSP efficiency improvement, respectively.

abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的量化已取得显着进展，旨在降低低位宽数据输入的计算和存储成本。然而，目前还没有关于如何更好地利用现有的全位宽处理单元（例如CPU和DSP）来在各种量化位宽下为卷积实现显着更高的计算吞吐量的系统研究。在本研究中，我们提出了 HiKonv，这是一种统一的解决方案，可最大化给定底层处理单元的计算吞吐量，通过新颖的按位并行计算处理低位宽量化数据输入。我们使用全位宽乘法器来实现高度并行化的低位宽卷积，建立了理论性能界限，并展示了该关键领域高性能计算的新突破。例如，单个 32 位处理单元可以在一条 CPU 指令下提供 128 个二值化卷积运算（乘法和加法），而单个 27x18 DSP 内核可以在一个周期内提供 8 个具有 4 位输入的卷积运算。我们展示了 HiKonv 在 CPU 和 FPGA 上对于卷积层或完整 DNN 模型的有效性。对于量化为 4 位的卷积层，HiKonv 比在 CPU 上使用 C++ 的基准实现实现了 3.17 倍的延迟改进。与 DAC-SDC 2020 FPGA 冠军模型相比，HiKonv 分别实现了 2.37 倍的吞吐量提升和 2.61 倍的 DSP 效率提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiKonv，通过新颖的位级并行计算方法，最大化现有处理单元的计算吞吐量以高效处理低比特量化卷积。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏系统性方法利用全比特宽处理单元（如CPU和DSP）高效执行多比特量化卷积，导致计算资源利用率不足。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立全比特乘法器的性能边界，设计位级并行计算架构，使单个32位处理单元可同时执行128次二值卷积操作，并在CPU和FPGA上验证实现。
AI.result: 在CPU上4比特量化卷积层较C++基线实现提速3.17倍，在FPGA上较DAC-SDC 2020冠军模型实现吞吐量提升2.37倍和DSP效率提升2.61倍。
AI.conclusion: HiKonv通过创新的位级管理与计算方法，有效提升了不同硬件平台下量化卷积的计算效率，为低比特神经网络加速提供了统一解决方案。

authors_text: Can Wang,Zhe Wang,Defang Chen,Sheng Zhou,Yan Feng,Chun Chen
title: Online Adversarial Knowledge Distillation for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络的在线对抗性知识蒸馏
comment: Published at Expert Systems with Applications (ESWA)
comments: Published at Expert Systems with Applications (ESWA)
abstract: Knowledge distillation, a technique recently gaining popularity for enhancing model generalization in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), operates under the assumption that both teacher and student models are trained on identical data distributions. However, its effect on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is less than satisfactory since the graph topology and node attributes are prone to evolve, thereby leading to the issue of distribution shift. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by simultaneously training a group of graph neural networks in an online distillation fashion, where the group knowledge plays a role as a dynamic virtual teacher and the structure changes in graph neural networks are effectively captured. To improve the distillation performance, two types of knowledge are transferred among the students to enhance each other: local knowledge reflecting information in the graph topology and node attributes, and global knowledge reflecting the prediction over classes. We transfer the global knowledge with KL-divergence as the vanilla knowledge distillation does, while exploiting the complicated structure of the local knowledge with an efficient adversarial cyclic learning framework. Extensive experiments verified the effectiveness of our proposed online adversarial distillation approach. The code is published at https://github.com/wangz3066/OnlineDistillGCN.
summary: Knowledge distillation, a technique recently gaining popularity for enhancing model generalization in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), operates under the assumption that both teacher and student models are trained on identical data distributions. However, its effect on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is less than satisfactory since the graph topology and node attributes are prone to evolve, thereby leading to the issue of distribution shift. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by simultaneously training a group of graph neural networks in an online distillation fashion, where the group knowledge plays a role as a dynamic virtual teacher and the structure changes in graph neural networks are effectively captured. To improve the distillation performance, two types of knowledge are transferred among the students to enhance each other: local knowledge reflecting information in the graph topology and node attributes, and global knowledge reflecting the prediction over classes. We transfer the global knowledge with KL-divergence as the vanilla knowledge distillation does, while exploiting the complicated structure of the local knowledge with an efficient adversarial cyclic learning framework. Extensive experiments verified the effectiveness of our proposed online adversarial distillation approach. The code is published at https://github.com/wangz3066/OnlineDistillGCN.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是一种最近流行的用于增强卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型泛化的技术，它的运行假设是教师和学生模型都在相同的数据分布上进行训练。然而，它对图神经网络（GNN）的效果并不理想，因为图拓扑和节点属性容易发生演化，从而导致分布偏移问题。在本文中，我们通过以在线蒸馏方式同时训练一组图神经网络来应对这一挑战，其中组知识充当动态虚拟教师的角色，并且有效捕获图神经网络的结构变化。为了提高蒸馏性能，两种类型的知识在学生之间转移以相互增强：反映图拓扑和节点属性中的信息的局部知识，以及反映类预测的全局知识。我们像普通知识蒸馏一样通过 KL 散度转移全局知识，同时通过有效的对抗性循环学习框架利用局部知识的复杂结构。大量的实验验证了我们提出的在线对抗蒸馏方法的有效性。代码发布于 https://github.com/wangz3066/OnlineDistillGCN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线对抗知识蒸馏方法，用于改进图神经网络（GNN）的模型泛化能力，以应对图结构和节点属性变化导致的分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏在卷积神经网络（CNN）中效果显著，但其假设师生模型数据分布一致，难以适应图神经网络中动态变化的图拓扑和节点属性，导致分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 通过在线蒸馏方式同时训练一组图神经网络，利用组内知识作为动态虚拟教师。转移局部知识（图结构与节点属性）和全局知识（类别预测），采用KL散度处理全局知识，结合对抗循环学习框架高效处理局部知识结构。
AI.result: 大量实验验证了所提在线对抗蒸馏方法的有效性，代码已开源。

search_text: Online Adversarial Knowledge Distillation for Graph Neural Networks 图神经网络的在线对抗性知识蒸馏 Knowledge distillation, a technique recently gaining popularity for enhancing model generalization in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), operates under the assumption that both teacher and student models are trained on identical data distributions. However, its effect on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is less than satisfactory since the graph topology and node attributes are prone to evolve, thereby leading to the issue of distribution shift. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by simultaneously training a group of graph neural networks in an online distillation fashion, where the group knowledge plays a role as a dynamic virtual teacher and the structure changes in graph neural networks are effectively captured. To improve the distillation performance, two types of knowledge are transferred among the students to enhance each other: local knowledge reflecting information in the graph topology and node attributes, and global knowledge reflecting the prediction over classes. We transfer the global knowledge with KL-divergence as the vanilla knowledge distillation does, while exploiting the complicated structure of the local knowledge with an efficient adversarial cyclic learning framework. Extensive experiments verified the effectiveness of our proposed online adversarial distillation approach. The code is published at https://github.com/wangz3066/OnlineDistillGCN. 知识蒸馏是一种最近流行的用于增强卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型泛化的技术，它的运行假设是教师和学生模型都在相同的数据分布上进行训练。然而，它对图神经网络（GNN）的效果并不理想，因为图拓扑和节点属性容易发生演化，从而导致分布偏移问题。在本文中，我们通过以在线蒸馏方式同时训练一组图神经网络来应对这一挑战，其中组知识充当动态虚拟教师的角色，并且有效捕获图神经网络的结构变化。为了提高蒸馏性能，两种类型的知识在学生之间转移以相互增强：反映图拓扑和节点属性中的信息的局部知识，以及反映类预测的全局知识。我们像普通知识蒸馏一样通过 KL 散度转移全局知识，同时通过有效的对抗性循环学习框架利用局部知识的复杂结构。大量的实验验证了我们提出的在线对抗蒸馏方法的有效性。代码发布于 https://github.com/wangz3066/OnlineDistillGCN。 本文提出了一种在线对抗知识蒸馏方法，用于改进图神经网络（GNN）的模型泛化能力，以应对图结构和节点属性变化导致的分布偏移问题。 Can Wang,Zhe Wang,Defang Chen,Sheng Zhou,Yan Feng,Chun Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Qixin Zhang,Wenbing Ye,Zaiyi Chen,Haoyuan Hu,Enhong Chen,Yang Yu
title: Online Allocation Problem with Two-sided Resource Constraints
title_zh: 双向资源约束的在线分配问题
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the online allocation problem of maximizing the overall revenue subject to both lower and upper bound constraints. Compared to the extensively studied online problems with only resource upper bounds, the two-sided constraints affect the prospects of resource consumption more severely. As a result, only limited violations of constraints or pessimistic competitive bounds could be guaranteed. To tackle the challenge, we define a measure of feasibility $ξ^*$ to evaluate the hardness of this problem, and estimate this measurement by an optimization routine with theoretical guarantees. We propose an online algorithm adopting a constructive framework, where we initialize a threshold price vector using the estimation, then dynamically update the price vector and use it for decision-making at each step. It can be shown that the proposed algorithm is $\big(1-O(\frac{\varepsilon}{ξ^*-\varepsilon})\big)$ or $\big(1-O(\frac{\varepsilon}{ξ^*-\sqrt{\varepsilon}})\big)$ competitive with high probability for $ξ^*$ known or unknown respectively. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first result establishing a nearly optimal competitive algorithm for solving two-sided constrained online allocation problems with a high probability of feasibility.

abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了在下限和上限约束下最大化总收入的在线分配问题。与广泛研究的仅具有资源上限的在线问题相比，双向约束对资源消耗的前景影响更为严重。因此，只能保证有限的违反约束或悲观竞争界限的行为。为了应对这一挑战，我们定义了可行性度量$ xi ^ * $来评估该问题的难度，并通过具有理论保证的优化例程来估计该度量。我们提出了一种采用构造性框架的在线算法，其中我们使用估计来初始化阈值价格向量，然后动态更新价格向量并将其用于每一步的决策。可以看出，所提出的算法对于已知或未知的$ xi ^ * $分别具有高概率的$ \ big（1-O（\ frac {\ varepsilon} {xi ^ * - \ varepsilon}）\ big）$或$ \ big（1-O（\ frac {\ varepsilon} {xi ^ * - \ sqrt {\ varepsilon}}）\ big）$竞争力。据我们所知，这是第一个建立近乎最优的竞争算法的结果，该算法用于解决具有高可行性的双边约束在线分配问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线资源分配问题，考虑上下界双重约束条件下的总体收益最大化。
AI.motivation: 现有在线分配问题多仅考虑资源上限约束，而双重约束（上下限）会严重影响资源消耗前景，导致约束违反或竞争比界难以保证。
AI.method: 定义可行性度量ξ*评估问题难度，通过优化算法估计ξ*，并提出动态更新价格向量的在线算法框架。
AI.result: 算法在ξ*已知或未知时分别达到$1-O(\ rac{\\varepsilon}{ξ^* - \\varepsilon})$或$1-O(\ rac{\\varepsilon}{ξ^* - \\sqrt{\\varepsilon}})$的竞争比，且具有高可行性概率。
AI.conclusion: 首次为双重约束在线分配问题设计了近似最优的高概率可行性算法，填补了该领域的研究空白。

authors_text: Xueyuan Zhao,Mehdi Rahmati,Dario Pompili
title: Source Feature Compression for Object Classification in Vision-Based Underwater Robotics
title_zh: 基于视觉的水下机器人中对象分类的源特征压缩
abstract: New efficient source feature compression solutions are proposed based on a two-stage Walsh-Hadamard Transform (WHT) for Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based object classification in underwater robotics. The object images are firstly transformed by WHT following a two-stage process. The transform-domain tensors have large values concentrated in the upper left corner of the matrices in the RGB channels. By observing this property, the transform-domain matrix is partitioned into inner and outer regions. Consequently, two novel partitioning methods are proposed in this work: (i) fixing the size of inner and outer regions; and (ii) adjusting the size of inner and outer regions adaptively per image. The proposals are evaluated with an underwater object dataset captured from the Raritan River in New Jersey, USA. It is demonstrated and verified that the proposals reduce the training time effectively for learning-based underwater object classification task and increase the accuracy compared with the competing methods. The object classification is an essential part of a vision-based underwater robot that can sense the environment and navigate autonomously. Therefore, the proposed method is well-suited for efficient computer vision-based tasks in underwater robotics applications.
summary: New efficient source feature compression solutions are proposed based on a two-stage Walsh-Hadamard Transform (WHT) for Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based object classification in underwater robotics. abstract_zh: 基于两阶段 Walsh-Hadamard 变换 (WHT)，提出了新的高效源特征压缩解决方案，用于水下机器人中基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对象分类。对象图像首先通过两阶段过程进行 WHT 变换。变换域张量的大值集中在 RGB 通道矩阵的左上角。通过观察这个性质，变换域矩阵被划分为内部区域和外部区域。因此，本工作提出了两种新颖的划分方法：（i）固定内部和外部区域的大小； (ii)自适应地调整每个图像的内部和外部区域的大小。使用从美国新泽西州拉里坦河捕获的水下物体数据集对这些提案进行了评估。经证明和验证，与竞争方法相比，该建议有效减少了基于学习的水下物体分类任务的训练时间并提高了准确性。物体分类是基于视觉的水下机器人的重要组成部分，可以感知环境并自主导航。因此，所提出的方法非常适合水下机器人应用中基于计算机视觉的高效任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于两阶段Walsh-Hadamard变换的源特征压缩方法，用于提升水下机器人视觉物体分类的效率与准确率。
AI.motivation: 水下机器人需要高效视觉处理以实现自主导航，传统CNN计算量大且资源消耗高，需优化特征压缩方法。
AI.method: 采用两阶段Walsh-Hadamard变换对图像进行域变换，利用变换后矩阵值分布特性，提出固定大小与自适应调整大小的内外区域分区策略。
AI.result: 在拉里坦河水下数据集实验中，方法有效减少训练时间并提升分类准确率，优于现有竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 该压缩方法适用于水下机器人高效视觉任务，为资源受限环境下的物体分类提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Source Feature Compression for Object Classification in Vision-Based Underwater Robotics 基于视觉的水下机器人中对象分类的源特征压缩 New efficient source feature compression solutions are proposed based on a two-stage Walsh-Hadamard Transform (WHT) for Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based object classification in underwater robotics. The object images are firstly transformed by WHT following a two-stage process. The transform-domain tensors have large values concentrated in the upper left corner of the matrices in the RGB channels. By observing this property, the transform-domain matrix is partitioned into inner and outer regions. Consequently, two novel partitioning methods are proposed in this work: (i) fixing the size of inner and outer regions; and (ii) adjusting the size of inner and outer regions adaptively per image. The proposals are evaluated with an underwater object dataset captured from the Raritan River in New Jersey, USA. It is demonstrated and verified that the proposals reduce the training time effectively for learning-based underwater object classification task and increase the accuracy compared with the competing methods. The object classification is an essential part of a vision-based underwater robot that can sense the environment and navigate autonomously. Therefore, the proposed method is well-suited for efficient computer vision-based tasks in underwater robotics applications. 基于两阶段 Walsh-Hadamard 变换 (WHT)，提出了新的高效源特征压缩解决方案，用于水下机器人中基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对象分类。对象图像首先通过两阶段过程进行 WHT 变换。变换域张量的大值集中在 RGB 通道矩阵的左上角。通过观察这个性质，变换域矩阵被划分为内部区域和外部区域。因此，本工作提出了两种新颖的划分方法：（i）固定内部和外部区域的大小； (ii)自适应地调整每个图像的内部和外部区域的大小。使用从美国新泽西州拉里坦河捕获的水下物体数据集对这些提案进行了评估。经证明和验证，与竞争方法相比，该建议有效减少了基于学习的水下物体分类任务的训练时间并提高了准确性。物体分类是基于视觉的水下机器人的重要组成部分，可以感知环境并自主导航。因此，所提出的方法非常适合水下机器人应用中基于计算机视觉的高效任务。 本文提出基于两阶段Walsh-Hadamard变换的源特征压缩方法，用于提升水下机器人视觉物体分类的效率与准确率。 Xueyuan Zhao,Mehdi Rahmati,Dario Pompili cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ruixing Cao,Akifumi Okuno,Kei Nakagawa,Hidetoshi Shimodaira
title: Improving Nonparametric Classification via Local Radial Regression with an Application to Stock Prediction
title_zh: 通过局部径向回归改进非参数分类并应用于库存预测
comment: 23pages, 10 figures, first two authors (R. Cao and A. Okuno) contributed equally to this work
comments: 23pages, 10 figures, first two authors (R. Cao and A. Okuno) contributed equally to this work
abstract: For supervised classification problems, this paper considers estimating the query's label probability through local regression using observed covariates. Well-known nonparametric kernel smoother and $k$-nearest neighbor ($k$-NN) estimator, which take label average over a ball around the query, are consistent but asymptotically biased particularly for a large radius of the ball. To eradicate such bias, local polynomial regression (LPoR) and multiscale $k$-NN (MS-$k$-NN) learn the bias term by local regression around the query and extrapolate it to the query itself. However, their theoretical optimality has been shown for the limit of the infinite number of training samples. For correcting the asymptotic bias with fewer observations, this paper proposes a \emph{local radial regression (LRR)} and its logistic regression variant called \emph{local radial logistic regression~(LRLR)}, by combining the advantages of LPoR and MS-$k$-NN. The idea is quite simple: we fit the local regression to observed labels by taking only the radial distance as the explanatory variable and then extrapolate the estimated label probability to zero distance. The usefulness of the proposed method is shown theoretically and experimentally. We prove the convergence rate of the $L^2$ risk for LRR with reference to MS-$k$-NN, and our numerical experiments, including real-world datasets of daily stock indices, demonstrate that LRLR outperforms LPoR and MS-$k$-NN.

abstract_zh: 对于监督分类问题，本文考虑通过使用观察到的协变量进行局部回归来估计查询的标签概率。众所周知的非参数核平滑器和 $k$ 最近邻 ($k$-NN) 估计器在查询周围的球上取标签平均值，它们是一致的，但渐近偏差，特别是对于大半径的球。为了消除这种偏差，局部多项式回归 (LPoR) 和多尺度 $k$-NN (MS-$k$-NN) 通过围绕查询的局部回归来学习偏差项，并将其外推到查询本身。然而，对于无限数量的训练样本的限制，它们的理论最优性已被证明。为了用较少的观测值来校正渐近偏差，本文结合了 LPoR 和 MS-$k$-NN 的优点，提出了 \emph{局部径向回归 (LRR)} 及其逻辑回归变体 \emph{局部径向逻辑回归~(LRLR)}。这个想法非常简单：我们仅将径向距离作为解释变量，将局部回归拟合到观察到的标签，然后将估计的标签概率外推到零距离。该方法的实用性在理论上和实验上得到了证明。我们参考 MS-$k$-NN 证明了 LRR 的 $L^2$ 风险的收敛速度，并且我们的数值实验（包括每日股票指数的真实数据集）表明 LRLR 优于 LPoR 和 MS-$k$-NN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种局部径向回归（LRR）及其逻辑回归变体（LRLR），用于改进非参数分类方法，特别是在股票预测中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统非参数方法如核平滑和k近邻（k-NN）在大半径情况下存在渐近偏差，且其理论最优性仅在无限样本下成立。现有局部多项式回归（LPoR）和多尺度k-NN（MS-k-NN）在有限样本下难以有效校正偏差。
AI.method: 通过仅以径向距离为解释变量拟合局部回归，并将估计的标签概率外推至零距离，结合LPoR与MS-k-NN的优势，提出局部径向回归（LRR）及逻辑回归版本LRLR。
AI.result: 理论证明了LRR的L²风险收敛率，并通过包括股票指数数据集的实验验证，LRLR在性能上优于LPoR和MS-k-NN。
AI.conclusion: LRR/LRLR有效降低了非参数分类的渐近偏差，在有限样本下表现更优，尤其适用于股票预测等实际场景。

authors_text: Gopal Sharma,Bidya Dash,Aruni RoyChowdhury,Matheus Gadelha,Marios Loizou,Liangliang Cao,Rui Wang,Erik Learned-Miller,Subhransu Maji,Evangelos Kalogerakis
title: PriFit: Learning to Fit Primitives Improves Few Shot Point Cloud Segmentation
title_zh: PriFit：学习拟合基元可改善少量镜头点云分割
abstract: We present PriFit, a semi-supervised approach for label-efficient learning of 3D point cloud segmentation networks. PriFit combines geometric primitive fitting with point-based representation learning. Its key idea is to learn point representations whose clustering reveals shape regions that can be approximated well by basic geometric primitives, such as cuboids and ellipsoids. The learned point representations can then be re-used in existing network architectures for 3D point cloud segmentation, and improves their performance in the few-shot setting. According to our experiments on the widely used ShapeNet and PartNet benchmarks, PriFit outperforms several state-of-the-art methods in this setting, suggesting that decomposability into primitives is a useful prior for learning representations predictive of semantic parts. We present a number of ablative experiments varying the choice of geometric primitives and downstream tasks to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.
summary: We present PriFit, a semi-supervised approach for label-efficient learning of 3D point cloud segmentation networks. PriFit combines geometric primitive fitting with point-based representation learning. Its key idea is to learn point representations whose clustering reveals shape regions that can be approximated well by basic geometric primitives, such as cuboids and ellipsoids. The learned point representations can then be re-used in existing network architectures for 3D point cloud segmentation, and improves their performance in the few-shot setting. According to our experiments on the widely used ShapeNet and PartNet benchmarks, PriFit outperforms several state-of-the-art methods in this setting, suggesting that decomposability into primitives is a useful prior for learning representations predictive of semantic parts. We present a number of ablative experiments varying the choice of geometric primitives and downstream tasks to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PriFit，一种半监督方法，用于 3D 点云分割网络的标签高效学习。 PriFit 将几何基元拟合与基于点的表示学习相结合。其关键思想是学习点表示，其聚类揭示了可以通过基本几何基元（例如长方体和椭球体）很好地近似的形状区域。然后，学习到的点表示可以在现有网络架构中重新用于 3D 点云分割，并提高其在少数镜头设置中的性能。根据我们对广泛使用的 ShapeNet 和 PartNet 基准的实验，PriFit 在这种情况下优于几种最先进的方法，这表明可分解为基元对于学习预测语义部分的表示是有用的先验。我们提出了许多不同几何基元和下游任务选择的烧蚀实验，以证明该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PriFit的半监督方法，用于提高3D点云分割网络在少量标注数据下的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 在3D点云分割任务中，标注数据的获取成本较高，因此需要一种能够在少量标注数据下仍能有效学习的模型。
AI.method: PriFit结合了几何原语拟合与点表示学习，通过学习能够聚类出可被基本几何原语（如立方体和椭球体）近似的点表示，从而提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet和PartNet基准测试中，PriFit优于多个现有方法，证明了将分割任务分解为几何原语的先验知识对学习语义部分表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将分割任务分解为几何原语作为先验知识，有助于在少量标注数据下提升3D点云分割模型的性能。

We present a number of ablative experiments varying the choice of geometric primitives and downstream tasks to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method. 我们提出了 PriFit，一种半监督方法，用于 3D 点云分割网络的标签高效学习。 PriFit 将几何基元拟合与基于点的表示学习相结合。其关键思想是学习点表示，其聚类揭示了可以通过基本几何基元（例如长方体和椭球体）很好地近似的形状区域。然后，学习到的点表示可以在现有网络架构中重新用于 3D 点云分割，并提高其在少数镜头设置中的性能。根据我们对广泛使用的 ShapeNet 和 PartNet 基准的实验，PriFit 在这种情况下优于几种最先进的方法，这表明可分解为基元对于学习预测语义部分的表示是有用的先验。我们提出了许多不同几何基元和下游任务选择的烧蚀实验，以证明该方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为PriFit的半监督方法，用于提高3D点云分割网络在少量标注数据下的学习效率。 Gopal Sharma,Bidya Dash,Aruni RoyChowdhury,Matheus Gadelha,Marios Loizou,Liangliang Cao,Rui Wang,Erik Learned-Miller,Subhransu Maji,Evangelos Kalogerakis cs.CV

authors_text: Erum Mushtaq,Chaoyang He,Jie Ding,Salman Avestimehr
title: SPIDER: Searching Personalized Neural Architecture for Federated Learning
title_zh: SPIDER：寻找联邦学习的个性化神经架构
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is an efficient learning framework that assists distributed machine learning when data cannot be shared with a centralized server due to privacy and regulatory restrictions. Recent advancements in FL use predefined architecture-based learning for all the clients. However, given that clients' data are invisible to the server and data distributions are non-identical across clients, a predefined architecture discovered in a centralized setting may not be an optimal solution for all the clients in FL. Motivated by this challenge, in this work, we introduce SPIDER, an algorithmic framework that aims to Search Personalized neural architecture for federated learning. SPIDER is designed based on two unique features: (1) alternately optimizing one architecture-homogeneous global model (Supernet) in a generic FL manner and one architecture-heterogeneous local model that is connected to the global model by weight sharing-based regularization (2) achieving architecture-heterogeneous local model by a novel neural architecture search (NAS) method that can select optimal subnet progressively using operation-level perturbation on the accuracy value as the criterion. Experimental results demonstrate that SPIDER outperforms other state-of-the-art personalization methods, and the searched personalized architectures are more inference efficient.

abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种高效的学习框架，当由于隐私和监管限制而无法与集中式服务器共享数据时，它可以协助分布式机器学习。 FL 的最新进展为所有客户使用预定义的基于架构的学习。然而，考虑到客户端的数据对服务器不可见，并且客户端之间的数据分布不相同，在集中设置中发现的预定义架构可能不是对于 FL 中的所有客户端来说的最佳解决方案。受这一挑战的推动，在这项工作中，我们引入了 SPIDER，这是一种旨在搜索联邦学习的个性化神经架构的算法框架。 SPIDER的设计基于两个独特的功能：（1）以通用FL方式交替优化一个架构同质全局模型（Supernet）和一个通过基于权重共享的正则化连接到全局模型的架构异构局部模型（2）通过一种新颖的神经架构搜索（NAS）方法实现架构异构局部模型，该方法可以使用对精度值的操作级扰动作为标准逐步选择最佳子网。实验结果表明，SPIDER 优于其他最先进的个性化方法，并且搜索到的个性化架构的推理效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPIDER算法框架，在联邦学习中搜索个性化神经网络架构，以解决客户端数据分布不一致导致的预定义架构非最优问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习使用统一架构可能无法适配客户端差异化的数据分布，而服务器无法直接访问客户端数据，导致个性化模型优化困难。
AI.method: SPIDER通过交替优化全局同构模型（Supernet）和本地异构模型，结合权重共享正则化，利用操作级扰动的准确率准则逐步筛选最优子网络。
AI.result: 实验表明SPIDER优于现有个性化方法，且搜索出的架构在推理效率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SPIDER通过架构异构性与全局协同机制，在联邦学习中实现了高效且个性化的模型搜索。

authors_text: Dongge Han,Chris Xiaoxuan Lu,Tomasz Michalak,Michael Wooldridge
title: Multiagent Model-based Credit Assignment for Continuous Control
title_zh: 基于多智能体模型的连续控制信用分配
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has recently shown great promise in robotic continuous control tasks. Nevertheless, prior research in this vein center around the centralized learning setting that largely relies on the communication availability among all the components of a robot. However, agents in the real world often operate in a decentralised fashion without communication due to latency requirements, limited power budgets and safety concerns. By formulating robotic components as a system of decentralised agents, this work presents a decentralised multiagent reinforcement learning framework for continuous control. To this end, we first develop a cooperative multiagent PPO framework that allows for centralized optimisation during training and decentralised operation during execution. However, the system only receives a global reward signal which is not attributed towards each agent. To address this challenge, we further propose a generic game-theoretic credit assignment framework which computes agent-specific reward signals. Last but not least, we also incorporate a model-based RL module into our credit assignment framework, which leads to significant improvement in sample efficiency. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework on experimental results on Mujoco locomotion control tasks. For a demo video please visit: https://youtu.be/gFyVPm4svEY.

abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）最近在机器人连续控制任务中显示出了巨大的前景。然而，这方面的先前研究主要围绕集中式学习设置，该设置在很大程度上依赖于机器人所有组件之间的通信可用性。然而，由于延迟要求、有限的功率预算和安全问题，现实世界中的代理通常以分散的方式运行，无需进行通信。通过将机器人组件制定为分散代理系统，这项工作提出了一种用于连续控制的分散多代理强化学习框架。为此，我们首先开发了一个协作式多智能体 PPO 框架，该框架允许在训练期间进行集中优化，在执行期间进行分散操作。然而，系统仅接收全局奖励信号，该信号并不归因于每个代理。为了应对这一挑战，我们进一步提出了一个通用的博弈论信用分配框架，用于计算特定于代理的奖励信号。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们还将基于模型的强化学习模块纳入我们的信用分配框架中，从而显着提高了样本效率。我们在 Mujoco 运动控制任务的实验结果上证明了我们的框架的有效性。如需演示视频，请访问：https://youtu.be/gFyVPm4svEY。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去中心化的多智能体强化学习框架，用于解决机器人连续控制任务中的信用分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖集中式学习和通信，但实际场景中因延迟、能耗和安全限制，智能体需独立运作，需解决去中心化下的信用分配难题。
AI.method: 开发了基于合作的多智能体PPO框架，结合集中训练与去中心化执行；提出博弈论信用分配机制以分解全局奖励，并引入模型预测控制提升样本效率。
AI.result: 在Mujoco运动控制任务中验证了框架有效性，实验结果表明其优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为去中心化连续控制提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案，尤其适用于实际机器人系统。

authors_text: Yayun Du,Andrew Miller,M. Khalid Jawed
title: Mechanics-based Analysis on Flagellated Robots
title_zh: 有鞭毛机器人的力学分析
abstract: We explore the locomotion of soft robots in granular medium (GM) resulting from the elastic deformation of slender rods. A low-cost, rapidly fabricable robot inspired by the physiological structure of bacteria is presented. It consists of a rigid head, with a motor and batteries embedded, and multiple elastic rods (our model for flagella) to investigate locomotion in GM. The elastic flagella are rotated at one end by the motor, and they deform due to the drag from GM, propelling the robot. The external drag is determined by the flagellar shape, while the latter changes due to the competition between external loading and elastic forces. In this coupled fluid-structure interaction problem, we observe that increasing the number of flagella can decrease or increase the propulsive speed of the robot, depending on the physical parameters of the system. This nonlinearity in the functional relation between propulsion and the parameters of this simple robot motivates us to fundamentally analyze its mechanics using theory, numerical simulation, and experiments. We present a simple Euler-Bernoulli beam theory-based analytical framework that is capable of qualitatively capturing both cases. Theoretical prediction quantitatively matches experiments when the flagellar deformation is small. To account for the geometrically nonlinear deformation often encountered in soft robots and microbes, we implement a simulation framework that incorporates discrete differential geometry-based simulations of elastic rods, a resistive force theory-based model for drag, and a modified Stokes law for the hydrodynamics of the robot head. Comparison with experimental data indicates that the simulations can quantitatively predict robotic motion. Overall, the theoretical and numerical tools presented in this paper can shed light on the design and control of this class of articulated robots in granular or fluid media.

This nonlinearity in the functional relation between propulsion and the parameters of this simple robot motivates us to fundamentally analyze its mechanics using theory, numerical simulation, and experiments. We present a simple Euler-Bernoulli beam theory-based analytical framework that is capable of qualitatively capturing both cases. Theoretical prediction quantitatively matches experiments when the flagellar deformation is small. To account for the geometrically nonlinear deformation often encountered in soft robots and microbes, we implement a simulation framework that incorporates discrete differential geometry-based simulations of elastic rods, a resistive force theory-based model for drag, and a modified Stokes law for the hydrodynamics of the robot head. Comparison with experimental data indicates that the simulations can quantitatively predict robotic motion. Overall, the theoretical and numerical tools presented in this paper can shed light on the design and control of this class of articulated robots in granular or fluid media.
abstract_zh: 我们探索软机器人在细长杆的弹性变形产生的颗粒介质（GM）中的运动。受细菌生理结构的启发，提出了一种低成本、可快速制造的机器人。它由一个刚性头部（嵌入电机和电池）和多个弹性杆（我们的鞭毛模型）组成，用于研究 GM 的运动。弹性鞭毛在电机的驱动下旋转一端，并由于 GM 的阻力而变形，从而推动机器人。外部阻力由鞭毛形状决定，而后者由于外部载荷和弹力之间的竞争而变化。在这个耦合的流固耦合问题中，我们观察到增加鞭毛的数量可以降低或提高机器人的推进速度，具体取决于系统的物理参数。这种简单机器人的推进力和参数之间函数关系的非线性促使我们利用理论、数值模拟和实验从根本上分析其力学。我们提出了一个简单的基于欧拉-伯努利梁理论的分析框架，能够定性地捕获这两种情况。当鞭毛变形较小时，理论预测与实验定量相符。为了解决软机器人和微生物中经常遇到的几何非线性变形，我们实现了一个模拟框架，该框架结合了基于离散微分几何的弹性杆模拟、基于阻力理论的阻力模型以及机器人头部流体动力学的修正斯托克斯定律。与实验数据的比较表明，模拟可以定量预测机器人运动。总体而言，本文提出的理论和数值工具可以为颗粒或流体介质中此类铰接式机器人的设计和控制提供线索。

authors_text: Ahmed Zaitoon,Hossam El Din Abd El Munim,Hazem Abbas
title: Improving Depth Estimation using Location Information
title_zh: 使用位置信息改进深度估计
comment: ef:2021 16th International Conference on Computer Engineering and Systems (ICCES)
comments: ef:2021 16th International Conference on Computer Engineering and Systems (ICCES)
abstract: The ability to accurately estimate depth information is crucial for many autonomous applications to recognize the surrounded environment and predict the depth of important objects. One of the most recently used techniques is monocular depth estimation where the depth map is inferred from a single image. This paper improves the self-supervised deep learning techniques to perform accurate generalized monocular depth estimation. The main idea is to train the deep model to take into account a sequence of the different frames, each frame is geotagged with its location information. This makes the model able to enhance depth estimation given area semantics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model to improve depth estimation results. The model is trained in a realistic environment and the results show improvements in the depth map after adding the location data to the model training phase.
summary: The ability to accurately estimate depth information is crucial for many autonomous applications to recognize the surrounded environment and predict the depth of important objects. One of the most recently used techniques is monocular depth estimation where the depth map is inferred from a single image. This paper improves the self-supervised deep learning techniques to perform accurate generalized monocular depth estimation. The main idea is to train the deep model to take into account a sequence of the different frames, each frame is geotagged with its location information. This makes the model able to enhance depth estimation given area semantics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model to improve depth estimation results. The model is trained in a realistic environment and the results show improvements in the depth map after adding the location data to the model training phase.
abstract_zh: 准确估计深度信息的能力对于许多自主应用识别周围环境并预测重要物体的深度至关重要。最近使用的技术之一是单目深度估计，其中深度图是从单个图像推断出来的。本文改进了自监督深度学习技术，以执行准确的广义单目深度估计。主要思想是训练深度模型以考虑不同帧的序列，每个帧都用其位置信息进行地理标记。这使得模型能够增强给定区域语义的深度估计。我们证明了我们的模型在改进深度估计结果方面的有效性。该模型在现实环境中进行训练，结果显示在模型训练阶段添加位置数据后深度图有所改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用位置信息改进单目深度估计的自监督深度学习方法，通过引入地理标签的多帧序列训练模型以提升深度估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法在复杂场景下泛化能力不足，无法有效利用环境语义信息，导致深度估计结果不够精确。
AI.method: 通过训练深度模型处理带有地理标签的多帧图像序列，使模型能够结合区域语义信息增强深度估计能力。
AI.result: 在真实环境测试中，加入位置信息的模型相比传统方法在深度图生成质量上取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 将位置信息纳入训练过程可有效提升深度估计模型的泛化能力，为自动驾驶等应用提供更可靠的环境感知方案。

authors_text: Farhad Khosravi,Artur Scherer,Pooya Ronagh
title: Mixed-Integer Programming Using a Bosonic Quantum Computer
title_zh: 使用玻色子量子计算机的混合整数编程
abstract: We propose a scheme for solving mixed-integer programming problems in which the optimization problem is translated to a ground-state preparation problem on a set of bosonic quantum field modes (qumodes). We perform numerical demonstrations by simulating a circuit-based optical quantum computer with each individual qumode prepared in a Gaussian state. We simulate an adiabatic evolution from an initial mixing Hamiltonian, written in terms of the momentum operators of the qumodes, to a final Hamiltonian which is a polynomial of the position and boson number operators. In these demonstrations, we solve a variety of small non-convex optimization problems in integer programming, continuous non-convex optimization, and mixed-integer programming.
summary: We propose a scheme for solving mixed-integer programming problems in which the optimization problem is translated to a ground-state preparation problem on a set of bosonic quantum field modes (qumodes). We perform numerical demonstrations by simulating a circuit-based optical quantum computer with each individual qumode prepared in a Gaussian state. We simulate an adiabatic evolution from an initial mixing Hamiltonian, written in terms of the momentum operators of the qumodes, to a final Hamiltonian which is a polynomial of the position and boson number operators. In these demonstrations, we solve a variety of small non-convex optimization problems in integer programming, continuous non-convex optimization, and mixed-integer programming.

search_text: Mixed-Integer Programming Using a Bosonic Quantum Computer 使用玻色子量子计算机的混合整数编程 We propose a scheme for solving mixed-integer programming problems in which the optimization problem is translated to a ground-state preparation problem on a set of bosonic quantum field modes (qumodes). We perform numerical demonstrations by simulating a circuit-based optical quantum computer with each individual qumode prepared in a Gaussian state. We simulate an adiabatic evolution from an initial mixing Hamiltonian, written in terms of the momentum operators of the qumodes, to a final Hamiltonian which is a polynomial of the position and boson number operators. In these demonstrations, we solve a variety of small non-convex optimization problems in integer programming, continuous non-convex optimization, and mixed-integer programming. 我们提出了一种解决混合整数规划问题的方案，其中优化问题转化为一组玻色量子场模式（qumodes）上的基态准备问题。我们通过模拟基于电路的光学量子计算机来进行数值演示，其中每个单独的量子模式都准备在高斯态下。我们模拟从初始混合哈密顿量（用量子模的动量算子编写）到最终哈密顿量（位置和玻色子数算子的多项式）的绝热演化。在这些演示中，我们解决了整数规划、连续非凸优化和混合整数规划中的各种小型非凸优化问题。 本文提出了一种利用玻色子量子计算机解决混合整数规划问题的方案，通过将优化问题转化为量子场模式的基态制备问题。 Farhad Khosravi,Artur Scherer,Pooya Ronagh quant-ph,cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Mesut Erhan Unal,Adriana Kovashka,Wen-Ting Chung,Yu-Ru Lin
title: Visual Persuasion in COVID-19 Social Media Content: A Multi-Modal Characterization
title_zh: COVID-19 社交媒体内容中的视觉说服：多模式表征
abstract: Social media content routinely incorporates multi-modal design to covey information and shape meanings, and sway interpretations toward desirable implications, but the choices and outcomes of using both texts and visual images have not been sufficiently studied. This work proposes a computational approach to analyze the outcome of persuasive information in multi-modal content, focusing on two aspects, popularity and reliability, in COVID-19-related news articles shared on Twitter. The two aspects are intertwined in the spread of misinformation: for example, an unreliable article that aims to misinform has to attain some popularity. This work has several contributions. First, we propose a multi-modal (image and text) approach to effectively identify popularity and reliability of information sources simultaneously. Second, we identify textual and visual elements that are predictive to information popularity and reliability. Third, by modeling cross-modal relations and similarity, we are able to uncover how unreliable articles construct multi-modal meaning in a distorted, biased fashion. Our work demonstrates how to use multi-modal analysis for understanding influential content and has implications to social media literacy and engagement.

abstract_zh: 社交媒体内容通常采用多模式设计来传达信息和塑造意义，并将解释转向理想的含义，但使用文本和视觉图像的选择和结果尚未得到充分研究。这项工作提出了一种计算方法来分析 Twitter 上分享的与 COVID-19 相关的新闻文章中多模式内容中说服性信息的结果，重点关注流行度和可靠性两个方面。这两个方面在错误信息的传播中交织在一起：例如，一篇旨在传播错误信息的不可靠文章必须获得一定的知名度。这项工作有几个贡献。首先，我们提出了一种多模式（图像和文本）方法来有效地同时识别信息源的流行度和可靠性。其次，我们确定可预测信息流行度和可靠性的文本和视觉元素。第三，通过对跨模​​态关系和相似性进行建模，我们能够揭示不可靠的文章如何以扭曲、有偏见的方式构建多模态含义。我们的工作展示了如何使用多模式分析来理解有影响力的内容，并对社交媒体素养和参与度产生影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态分析方法，研究疫情期间社交媒体内容中视觉与文本元素如何共同影响信息的流行度与可信度。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体多模态内容在信息传播中至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对文本与视觉元素协同作用下虚假信息传播机制的系统分析。
AI.method: 结合文本与图像分析，通过计算模型同时评估信息流行度与可信度，利用跨模态关系建模揭示多模态说服策略。
AI.result: 识别出影响信息流行度与可信度的关键文本及视觉特征，并发现不可靠信息通过扭曲的多模态组合强化误导性内容。
AI.conclusion: 多模态分析可有效解析虚假信息传播机制，为提升社交媒体素养及内容监管提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Sedigheh Eslami,Gerard de Melo,Christoph Meinel
title: Does CLIP Benefit Visual Question Answering in the Medical Domain as Much as it Does in the General Domain?
title_zh: CLIP 在医疗领域和在一般领域对视觉问答的好处是否相同？
abstract: Contrastive Language--Image Pre-training (CLIP) has shown remarkable success in learning with cross-modal supervision from extensive amounts of image--text pairs collected online. Thus far, the effectiveness of CLIP has been investigated primarily in general-domain multimodal problems. This work evaluates the effectiveness of CLIP for the task of Medical Visual Question Answering (MedVQA). To this end, we present PubMedCLIP, a fine-tuned version of CLIP for the medical domain based on PubMed articles. Our experiments are conducted on two MedVQA benchmark datasets and investigate two MedVQA methods, MEVF (Mixture of Enhanced Visual Features) and QCR (Question answering via Conditional Reasoning). For each of these, we assess the merits of visual representation learning using PubMedCLIP, the original CLIP, and state-of-the-art MAML (Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning) networks pre-trained only on visual data. We open source the code for our MedVQA pipeline and pre-training PubMedCLIP. CLIP and PubMedCLIP achieve improvements in comparison to MAML's visual encoder. PubMedCLIP achieves the best results with gains in the overall accuracy of up to 3%. Individual examples illustrate the strengths of PubMedCLIP in comparison to the previously widely used MAML networks. Visual representation learning with language supervision in PubMedCLIP leads to noticeable improvements for MedVQA. Our experiments reveal distributional differences in the two MedVQA benchmark datasets that have not been imparted in previous work and cause different back-end visual encoders in PubMedCLIP to exhibit different behavior on these datasets. Moreover, we witness fundamental performance differences of VQA in general versus medical domains.

abstract_zh: 对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）在通过在线收集的大量图像-文本对进行跨模式监督学习方面取得了显着的成功。到目前为止，CLIP 的有效性主要在一般域多模态问题中进行了研究。这项工作评估了 CLIP 在医学视觉问答 (MedVQA) 任务中的有效性。为此，我们推出了 PubMedCLIP，这是基于 PubMed 文章的针对医学领域的 CLIP 的微调版本。我们的实验在两个 MedVQA 基准数据集上进行，并研究了两种 MedVQA 方法：MEVF（增强视觉特征混合）和 QCR（通过条件推理回答问题）。对于其中每一个，我们使用 PubMedCLIP、原始 CLIP 和仅在视觉数据上进行预训练的最先进的 MAML（模型无关元学习）网络来评估视觉表示学习的优点。我们开源了 MedVQA 管道和预训练 PubMedCLIP 的代码。与 MAML 的视觉编码器相比，CLIP 和 PubMedCLIP 实现了改进。 PubMedCLIP 取得了最佳结果，总体准确率提高了 3%。个别示例说明了 PubMedCLIP 与之前广泛使用的 MAML 网络相比的优势。 PubMedCLIP 中的语言监督视觉表示学习显着改善了 MedVQA。我们的实验揭示了两个 MedVQA 基准数据集的分布差异，这些差异在之前的工作中尚未体现，并导致 PubMedCLIP 中的不同后端视觉编码器在这些数据集上表现出不同的行为。此外，我们还发现 VQA 在一般领域与医疗领域的根本性能差异。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了CLIP模型在医疗领域视觉问答任务（MedVQA）中的有效性，并与通用领域表现进行对比。
AI.motivation: 尽管CLIP在通用多模态任务中表现出色，但其在医疗领域的应用效果尚未被充分验证。医疗领域需要结合专业文本与图像的跨模态理解，因此需探索CLIP的适应性。
AI.method: 基于PubMed文章微调CLIP得到PubMedCLIP，在两个MedVQA基准数据集上测试MEVF和QCR两种方法，对比PubMedCLIP、原始CLIP及仅视觉预训练的MAML模型性能。
AI.result: PubMedCLIP在整体准确率上较MAML提升3%，在特定案例中表现更优；发现两个数据集的分布差异导致不同视觉编码器表现不一致。
AI.conclusion: 语言监督下的视觉表示学习（如PubMedCLIP）显著提升MedVQA性能，但医疗与通用领域在VQA任务中存在本质差异，需针对性优化模型。

Moreover, we witness fundamental performance differences of VQA in general versus medical domains. 对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）在通过在线收集的大量图像-文本对进行跨模式监督学习方面取得了显着的成功。到目前为止，CLIP 的有效性主要在一般域多模态问题中进行了研究。这项工作评估了 CLIP 在医学视觉问答 (MedVQA) 任务中的有效性。为此，我们推出了 PubMedCLIP，这是基于 PubMed 文章的针对医学领域的 CLIP 的微调版本。我们的实验在两个 MedVQA 基准数据集上进行，并研究了两种 MedVQA 方法：MEVF（增强视觉特征混合）和 QCR（通过条件推理回答问题）。对于其中每一个，我们使用 PubMedCLIP、原始 CLIP 和仅在视觉数据上进行预训练的最先进的 MAML（模型无关元学习）网络来评估视觉表示学习的优点。我们开源了 MedVQA 管道和预训练 PubMedCLIP 的代码。与 MAML 的视觉编码器相比，CLIP 和 PubMedCLIP 实现了改进。 PubMedCLIP 取得了最佳结果，总体准确率提高了 3%。个别示例说明了 PubMedCLIP 与之前广泛使用的 MAML 网络相比的优势。 PubMedCLIP 中的语言监督视觉表示学习显着改善了 MedVQA。我们的实验揭示了两个 MedVQA 基准数据集的分布差异，这些差异在之前的工作中尚未体现，并导致 PubMedCLIP 中的不同后端视觉编码器在这些数据集上表现出不同的行为。此外，我们还发现 VQA 在一般领域与医疗领域的根本性能差异。 本文评估了CLIP模型在医疗领域视觉问答任务（MedVQA）中的有效性，并与通用领域表现进行对比。 Sedigheh Eslami,Gerard de Melo,Christoph Meinel cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Kevin Lee Hunter,Lawrence Spracklen,Subutai Ahmad
title: Two Sparsities Are Better Than One: Unlocking the Performance Benefits of Sparse-Sparse Networks
title_zh: 两种稀疏性优于一种：释放稀疏网络的性能优势
abstract: In principle, sparse neural networks should be significantly more efficient than traditional dense networks. Neurons in the brain exhibit two types of sparsity; they are sparsely interconnected and sparsely active. These two types of sparsity, called weight sparsity and activation sparsity, when combined, offer the potential to reduce the computational cost of neural networks by two orders of magnitude. Despite this potential, today's neural networks deliver only modest performance benefits using just weight sparsity, because traditional computing hardware cannot efficiently process sparse networks. In this article we introduce Complementary Sparsity, a novel technique that significantly improves the performance of dual sparse networks on existing hardware. We demonstrate that we can achieve high performance running weight-sparse networks, and we can multiply those speedups by incorporating activation sparsity. Using Complementary Sparsity, we show up to 100X improvement in throughput and energy efficiency performing inference on FPGAs. We analyze scalability and resource tradeoffs for a variety of kernels typical of commercial convolutional networks such as ResNet-50 and MobileNetV2. Our results with Complementary Sparsity suggest that weight plus activation sparsity can be a potent combination for efficiently scaling future AI models.

abstract_zh: 原则上，稀疏神经网络应该比传统的密集网络更加高效。大脑中的神经元表现出两种类型的稀疏性：它们相互联系稀疏且活跃。这两种类型的稀疏性（称为权重稀疏性和激活稀疏性）结合起来，有可能将神经网络的计算成本降低两个数量级。尽管有这种潜力，但当今的神经网络仅使用权重稀疏性只能提供适度的性能优势，因为传统的计算硬件无法有效地处理稀疏网络。在本文中，我们介绍了互补稀疏性，这是一种新技术，可以显着提高现有硬件上双稀疏网络的性能。我们证明了我们可以实现运行权重稀疏网络的高性能，并且我们可以通过结合激活稀疏性来倍增这些加速。使用互补稀疏性，我们在 FPGA 上执行推理的吞吐量和能源效率提高了 100 倍。我们分析了商业卷积网络（例如 ResNet-50 和 MobileNetV2）的各种典型内核的可扩展性和资源权衡。我们的互补稀疏性结果表明，权重加上激活稀疏性可以成为有效扩展未来人工智能模型的有效组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为互补稀疏性的技术，通过结合权重稀疏性和激活稀疏性，显著提升稀疏神经网络在现有硬件上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管稀疏神经网络理论上更高效，但现有硬件难以有效处理仅权重稀疏的网络，而结合激活稀疏性的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 引入互补稀疏性技术，优化同时具备权重和激活稀疏性的网络结构，使其在FPGA等硬件上高效运行。
AI.result: 在FPGA上实现推理吞吐量和能效高达100倍的提升，并分析了多种卷积网络的可扩展性与资源权衡。
AI.conclusion: 权重与激活稀疏性的结合是未来高效扩展AI模型的有力方案，互补稀疏性技术可有效释放其潜力。
